structure.identification: idstatus > dmaddres > dmc > avee (child elements: modelic, sdc, chapnum, section, subsect, subject, discode, discodev, incode, incodev, itemloc)
structure.title: idstatus > dmaddres > dmtitle > techname + infoname
structure.rpc: idstatus > status > rpc (@rpcname) — text content is the RPC code
structure.originator: idstatus > status > orig (@origname) — text content is the orig code
structure.brexref: idstatus > status > brexref > refdm > avee (same child elements as dmc/avee)

generation_rules.rule_id: atributo id en objrule — valor igual al BRDP identifier
generation_rules.no_brDecisionRef: En 3.0.1 NO existe brDecisionRef — el id va directamente en el atributo id de objrule
generation_rules.self_reference: brexref/refdm/avee debe tener los mismos valores que dmc/avee
